query: What are the top AI news headlines today? Include sources.

content.title: Anthropic launches code review tool to check flood of AI-generated code | TechCrunch
Microsoft AI Blogs | Artificial Intelligence News and Updates
What’s next in AI: 7 trends to watch in 2026

textResponse:
Here are some of the **top AI headlines I could verify today, Thursday, April 9, 2026**:

1. **Anthropic launches an AI code-review tool for enterprise developers.**  
   TechCrunch reports Anthropic introduced “Code Review” in Claude Code, aimed at reviewing the surge of AI-generated pull requests and catching logic errors before code ships. ([techcrunch.com](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/09/anthropic-launches-code-review-tool-to-check-flood-of-ai-generated-code/?utm_source=openai))

2. **Microsoft is pushing new enterprise AI model rollouts, including GPT-5.4 in Microsoft Foundry.**  
   Microsoft’s AI blog says GPT-5.4 is being made generally available soon in Foundry, signaling continued competition around enterprise AI platforms and model distribution. ([microsoft.com](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/ai/blog/page/106/?utm_source=openai))

3. **Google continues expanding Gemini and broader AI infrastructure efforts.**  
   Google’s latest AI recap highlights broader Gemini access, multimodal AI search, new TPU infrastructure, and an open agent protocol called Agent2Agent. While this is not a same-day breaking-news item, it remains one of the more recent major official AI update roundups I found. ([blog.google](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/google-ai-updates-april-2025/?utm_source=openai))

4. **Microsoft is framing 2026 around “AI agents” and higher-quality model output.**  
   In a Microsoft feature on AI trends for 2026, the company argues the next phase of AI will be judged more by usefulness and reliability than by model size alone. ([news.microsoft.com](https://news.microsoft.com/source/features/ai/whats-next-in-ai-7-trends-to-watch-in-2026?msockid=3c6fdaed26a565120acdcc39274f6470&utm_source=openai))

A quick note: I **did not find a clean, comprehensive “today only” AI headline list from Reuters/AP in the search results**, so the list above is based on the most relevant and recent items I could verify from reputable tech and official sources. ([techcrunch.com](https://techcrunch.com/category/artificial-intelligence/?utm_source=openai))

If you want, I can do a **deeper roundup with 8–10 headlines** and separate them into:
- **Big Tech**
- **Startups/funding**
- **AI policy/regulation**
- **Research/model releases**
